title: Tzuzi's Weaponry
description: Adds multiple weapons. This is just version 1.0. Weaponsmith villagers are important to acquire items to craft the weapons in survival.
body:
This mod adds 6 different and unique weapons to Minecraft. All of the weapons are craftable. You will need a weaponsmith villager at journeyman and expert levels to get materials for crafting the weapons.

**This mod includes the following weapons:**

Amaterasu - a heavy sword with special abilities.

Crucible - a weapon which has a fast attack speed and high damage with abilities.

Poseidon - a trident which summons lightning on the occasion of damaging other mobs, this includes players. It also has an ability.

Lynx Claws - a light and fast weapon for attacking with abilities.

Atomic Longsword - another heavy weapon with high damage and overpowered abilities.

Velocity - (Easter egg sword)

Each weapon will be recieving updates throughout the time of upload.

**The mod also adds the following items:**

Sharingan eye - used for crafting the Amaterasu Sword.

Core and Handle - used for crafting every weapon.
